Sir Alec Shelbrooke MP

  • Tweet

Sir Alec is regularly out and about across our area meeting residents and listening to their views. If you'd like to contact Alec, you do so here:

Address:

The Rt Hon. Sir Alec Shelbrooke, M.P. 

House of Commons, London, SW1A 0AA

Phone: 01937 589 002

Email: [email protected]

You can follow Alec on social media: (Facebook) fb.com/alec.shelbrooke and (Twitter) @Alec_Shelbrooke.

 

Find out more about Alec using the menu page top left.

 

Sir Alec Shelbrooke, M.P.
